description: Enterprise-grade budget management and amortized cost alerting for Azure at scale. Deploys a complete FinOps governance stack: subscription budgets with 5-tier thresholds, auto-budget assignment for new resource groups via Event Grid, self-service budget change requests with guardrails, daily amortized cost evaluation via Azure Functions, Cosmos DB inventory store, Azure Workbook dashboard, Power BI templates, and audit policy enforcement. Bridges Azure's actual-cost-only budget limitation with amortized cost tracking for Reserved Instances and Savings Plans. Entirely serverless at ~$2.50/month/subscription.
summary: Deploy a complete FinOps cost governance platform with amortized cost alerting, auto-budgets, self-service changes, Cosmos DB inventory, and dashboards.
